name: gridspan-firstcol
description: Table with firstCol conditional (green). Row 0 cell (0,0) has gridSpan=2 spanning cols 0-1. Row 1 has normal 3 cells.
expected_behavior: Row 0: merged cell spanning cols 0-1 gets firstCol (green) because cell_col==0. Cell at col 2 gets no conditional. Row 1: cell (1,0) gets firstCol (green). Cells (1,1) and (1,2) no conditional.
